scope.policy: latest archived pre-kickoff forecast with half-time/full-time quotes, joined to local settlements by match id; settlements missing halftime scores are excluded

metricDefinitions.accuracy: top probability half-time/full-time selection equals the realized selection
metricDefinitions.top3Accuracy: realized selection appears in the three highest model probabilities
metricDefinitions.averageLogLoss: negative log probability assigned to the realized selection
metricDefinitions.averageBrier: sum of squared probability errors across the nine selections
metricDefinitions.inSampleMostCommonAccuracy: accuracy from always picking the most frequent realized class in this same sample
metricDefinitions.outcomeAssistance: W/D/L metrics before and after adding the half-full specialist signal
